401.title: Authentication error
401.headline: Unauthorized connection.
401.body: The account you tried to sign in with is not authorized (unknown, inactive, or filtered account). If you believe this is an error, please contact an admin.

403.title: Access denied
403.headline: Unauthorized operation.
403.body: You do not have the required permissions to access this page. If you believe this is an error, please contact an admin.

404.title: Page not found
404.headline: The page you are looking for cannot be found. We apologize for the inconvenience.
404.body: If you typed the web address in the browser, check that it is correct. The page may no longer be available.

500.title: Unexpected error
500.headline: Sorry, the service is experiencing a problem. We are working to resolve it as quickly as possible.
500.body: Try refreshing the page or try again later.

construction.title: Under construction
construction.headline: This service is under construction.
construction.body: We are working to make it available as soon as possible.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.headline: The service is currently under maintenance.
maintenance.body: We are working to restore it as quickly as possible.

home.title: Create roadmaps your
home.description: Collect feedback, prioritize by vote, and share your public roadmap. Built for public institutions and product teams.

roadmap.title: Collaborative roadmap
roadmap.description: Manage your priorities with full transparency.

vote.title: Citizen voting
vote.description: Involve your users in the decision-making process directly.

pricing.title: Transparent and accessible
pricing.description: Free to start, add-ons to go further. No surprises.

community.name: Community
community.description: Boards, votes, comments, public roadmap. All the open source core.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Integrations, custom domains, enterprise SSO, advanced tracking.

complete.name: Complete
complete.description: Everything in Pro + API keys, webhooks, advanced 2FA, audit log.

ctaSection.title: Launch your collaborative roadmap
ctaSection.description: Join the public transparency movement. Start collecting constructive feedback today.

general.title: General
general.seedEmpty: Your space is empty. You can initialize default data to get started quickly.
general.privacyDescription: Control access to your space and anonymous contributions.
general.isPrivateHelper: Only tenant members can access the content
general.moderationDescription: Set content moderation and approval rules.
general.allowPostEditsHelper: Authors can edit their posts after publication
general.requirePostApprovalHelper: New posts must be approved by a moderator before being visible
general.allowPostDeletionHelper: Authors can delete their own posts
general.headerDescription: Customize navigation and elements displayed in the header.
general.showRoadmapInHeaderHelper: A link to the roadmap appears in the main navigation
general.visibilityDescription: Manage user interactions: votes, comments, and feedback.
general.allowAnonymousVotingHelper: Non-logged-in visitors can vote on posts

general.dangerZoneDescription: These actions are irreversible. Proceed with caution.
general.purgeConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data for this tenant (boards, posts, statuses, comments…)? This action is irreversible.
general.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tenant? This action is irreversible.

integrations.title: Connectors
integrations.description: Connect third-party tools to synchronize your posts and boards.
integrations.empty: No connectors configured. Add a Notion integration to sync your data.

wizard.connectionDescription: Enter your Notion API key (Internal Integration Token). You can create one in your Notion integration settings.
wizard.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Check your API key.
wizard.databaseDescription: Select the Notion database to sync. Your Notion integration must have access to this database.
wizard.noDatabases: No accessible databases. Make sure your Notion integration has access to at least one database.
wizard.noSchema: Schema not loaded. Go back to the previous step.
wizard.mappingDescription: Map Notion properties to your space concepts.
wizard.descriptionFieldHint: Notion property for post description, or page content
wizard.dateFieldHint: Notion property to sync as the post creation date. If not mapped, the import date will be used.
wizard.commentsFieldHint: Notion text property to display comment count and link
wizard.boardMappingDescription: Map a Notion property to your space boards.
wizard.configDescription: Configure the name and sync mode.
wizard.syncDirectionHint: Bidirectional syncs both ways. Inbound imports from Notion (read-only in RF). Outbound exports to Notion.
wizard.defaultBoardInfo: Without board mapping, a default board will be created automatically on submission.
wizard.inboundHidesOutboundFields: In inbound mode, comments and votes fields are unavailable (they only push data to Notion).
